text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hush! Can you hear the plushie?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She's saying, "Thank you for taking me out of
there, Trainer!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm really glad too. Thanks to you, I can hold this
darling pony in my arms.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, to be truthful... I'd really like to get her more
friends. Think you can do it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haha! I'm only kidding! I'm happy enough as is!
